caption: A woman with dark hair, wearing a purple and white striped shirt and a black headset with a microphone, is seated in a room. Behind her are light-colored curtains, with a hint of blue fabric on the left edge. A plain wall and the edge of a neutral-colored piece of furniture are visible in the background. The text "Nancy Ramya" appears in the bottom-left corner of each shot. As the sequence progresses, the woman remains in a centered, head-on position, looking directly toward the camera. Her facial expression shifts slightly from a neutral, focused gaze to a slightly more open-mouthed expression as she appears to be speaking. Her head remains relatively still, and the environment and lighting stay consistent throughout the frames.
